CVE-2019-18978.title: An issue was discovered in the rack-cors (aka Rack CORS Middlewar ...
CVE-2019-18978.summary: An issue was discovered in the rack-cors (aka Rack CORS Middleware) gem before 1.0.4 for Ruby. It allows ../ directory traversal to access private resources because resource matching does not ensure that pathnames are in a canonical format.
